page_content:
### **2. Dr. Patrick Horn (The Alpha Fold Catalyst)**  
_Focus: How his class sparked your interest in AI._  
**Subject:** Medical School LOR Request: Arian Moridani (Biochemistry I)  
Dear Dr. Horn,  
I hope you’re doing well (and still enjoying the occasional Dr. Pepper!).  
I wanted to reach out and share how much of an impact your **Biochemistry I** course had on my career trajectory. The research-based projects you assigned, particularly our work with **Alpha Fold**, were what initially sparked my interest in the intersection of biology and artificial intelligence.  
Since then, I’ve moved from my **B.S. in BME** (Cum Laude) to a **Master’s in Computer Science** at Georgia Tech to master the "software" side of medicine. As I prepare my medical school applications, your perspective on my academic engagement would be invaluable.  
I’m using **Interfolio** this cycle to ensure the process is seamless and only requires a single upload from you. Would you be willing to provide an updated letter of recommendation?  
Sincerely, Arian Moridani  
---
